positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a curious woodland animal, such as a fox or a squirrel, surrounded by delicate stylized flora and leaves. The composition should be centered and contained within an emblem or circular frame, emphasizing clean, graphic silhouettes. Use a high-contrast, single-color style (e.g., black on white, or deep indigo on cream) with fine, intricate details in the linework. The style should be highly decorative and suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing, evoking a nature-inspired, bohemian aesthetic. The lighting should be flat and uniform, allowing the strong lines to pop.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, messy, color gradients, photorealistic, solid blocks of color, jpeg artifacts
